title: Transformers: The Movie
synopsis: Set between Seasons 2 and 3 of the original series. In the year 2005, the Autobots face their darkest hour as the planet-eating Unicron threatens Cybertron. Optimus Prime falls in an epic battle with Megatron, and a new generation of heroes — led by Hot Rod, who becomes Rodimus Prime — must rise to save their world.

episodes.title: Transformers: The Movie
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots face their darkest hour as Unicron, a planet-eating titan, threatens Cybertron. Optimus Prime falls in battle against Megatron, who is reformatted into Galvatron by Unicron. Hot Rod must claim the Matrix of Leadership and become Rodimus Prime to save both Earth and Cybertron.

facts: Orson Welles voiced Unicron in one of his final film roles before his death.
The film featured an all-star voice cast including Leonard Nimoy, Robert Stack, Judd Nelson, and Eric Idle.
The iconic power ballad 'The Touch' by Stan Bush became synonymous with Transformers.
The death of Optimus Prime traumatized a generation of children and caused significant parental backlash.
Originally a box office disappointment, it became a beloved cult classic on home video.
